title: Trucks
description: A movie about a boy who follows his dreams. Johnny Half-ton sets out to prove he’s the toughest truck in town.
quote: We’ll see who’s got pull around here!
altHero: Johnny Half-ton, a truck with eyes, with his lady friend, Cindy Cupholder, a pink car
alt1: four trucks tethered to a block of bricks
alt3: Rita the Meter Maid, a green car, crying via her windshield wiper fluid
alt4: Jonny and Cindy cuddling under the moonlight
